title: McCarthy Tétrault Recognized as Industry Leader by Chambers Global 2020
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Recognized as Industry Leader by Chambers Global 2020
Continuously driving success for clients globally by delivering pragmatic business solutions and industry expertise, McCarthy Tétrault has been internationally recognized by Chambers Global: The World’s Leading Lawyers for Business . Additionally, the Firm received the most Band 1 lawyer rankings, the most Band 1 Lawyer and Practice Rankings combined, the most Total Lawyer and Practice Rankings combined, and the Highest number of Lawyers Rankings in the top bands.

#### Chambers Global 2020 recognized the Firm with:
- 15 Band 1 lawyer rankings
- 10 Band 1 practice area rankings
- 60 total lawyer rankings
- 19 practice areas recognized
“This recognition demonstrates McCarthy Tétrault’s deep understanding of the industries in which Canada is leading the charge globally,” said Dave Leonard, CEO at McCarthy Tétrault. “Our Firm is focused on enabling success for clients doing business around the world, and we thank them for continuing to trust us to provide valuable guidance, wherever their business takes them.”

#### The Firm received Band 1 rankings in the following areas:
- Information Technology
- International Trade/WTO
- Disputes (International & Cross-Border)
- Mining (International & Cross-Border)
- Projects: PPP & Infrastructure
- Telecoms, Media & Broadcasting

#### The following McCarthy Tétrault lawyers received Band 1 rankings and above:
- Andrew Parker Capital Markets: Debt & Equity, Band 1
- Marc J MacMullin Capital Markets: Securitisation, Band 1
- Jason Gudofsky Competition/Antitrust, Band 1
- Donald B Houston Competition/Antitrust: Litigators, Band 1
- R Paul Steep Dispute Resolution: Litigation, Band 1
- George Vegh Energy: Power (Regulatory), Band 1
- David Lever Energy: Power (Transactional), Eminent Practitioner
- Paul Cassidy Environment, Band 1
- Stéphane Duval Immigration, Band 1
- Barry Sookman Information Technology, Star Individual
- Christine Ing Information Technology, Band 1
- George Takach Information Technology, Band 1
- Barry Sookman Intellectual Property, Band 1
- John Boscariol International Trade/WTO, Band 1
- Roger Taplin Mining (International & Cross-Border), Band 1
- Linda G Brown Project Finance, Band 1
- Grant Buchanan Telecoms, Media & Broadcasting, Band 1

#### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.

#### About Chambers and Partners
Published since 1990, Chambers and Partners' guides rank the best law firms and lawyers across more than 200 jurisdictions throughout the world. Rankings are based on independent and objective research, and peer and client reviews. Chambers Global rates law firms and lawyers in 190 countries across the world.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact:
